headline: The Bull Case For Elastic (ESTC) Could Change Following Its Unified Observability Push Into Metrics And Logs
summary: In late June 2026, Elastic announced new observability capabilities that unify metrics and logs on its Elasticsearch-based platform, adding native Prometheus and PromQL support, Kubernetes investigation workflows, and automated migration tools from Datadog and Grafana across Elastic Cloud, serverless, and self-managed deployments. A distinctive aspect of this launch is Elastic’s attempt to position its columnar metrics engine as a single, high-performance backend for logs, metrics, and...

headline: Elastic (ESTC) Launches Unified Observability Platform To Win Over Prometheus Users
summary: Elastic (NYSE:ESTC) has introduced a unified observability platform that combines metrics and logs in a single experience. The release adds native Prometheus and PromQL support, aiming to simplify adoption for existing open source monitoring users. Elastic is offering automated migration paths from Datadog and Grafana, targeting teams that want to consolidate tools. The platform includes integrated Kubernetes workflows designed for SRE and DevOps teams managing cloud native...

headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise With Tesla, Jobs Report Ahead
summary: Stocks fell as Meta buzz hit SpaceX, Micron and many AI stocks. Tesla is near a buy point with deliveries due. The June jobs report also is on tap.

headline: Benchmark Maintains Buy on Datadog, Raises Price Target to $330
summary: Benchmark  analyst Yi Fu Lee   maintains Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) with a Buy and raises the price target from $260 to $330.
